title: TaskTracker Configuration Interface
description: The 'server/tasktracker/TTConfig.java' file serves as a configuration interface for MapReduce tasks in Hadoop. It extends the MRConfig interface, providing specific constants for TaskTracker settings. These constants include TT_INDEX_CACHE, TT_MAP_SLOTS, and TT_RESOURCE_CALCULATOR_PLUGIN. The interface doesn't process data but defines configuration parameters used by other system components. It depends on the MRConfig interface and classification annotations for specifying audience and stability.
